description.short: Get your trip off to a great start with a stay at this property, which offers free Wi-Fi in all rooms. Strategically situated in Banda Aceh, allowing you access and proximity to local attractions and sights. This 3-star property features fitness center to make your stay more indulgent and memorable.

details.title: Infant 0-2 year(s)
details.description: Stay for free if using existing bedding. Note, if you need a cot, it may incur an extra charge and is subject to availability.

adult: Guests 7 years and older are considered adults.
extraBed: Extra beds are dependent on the room you choose. Please check the individual room capacity for more details.
additional: When booking more than 5 rooms, different policies and additional supplements may apply.

reviews.hotelName: Townhouse Oak near Tugu Simpang Lima formerly GM Inn Hotel

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.responderName: Townhouse Oak near Tugu Simpang Lima formerly GM Inn Hotel
comments.reviewComments: GM Inn Syariah Hotel: Good cleanliness, comfort of the bed, functionality of facilities (AC, Wi-Fi, shower), and interior design. The rooms are very tidy, quiet, and have friendly staff. Mr. Nasrul and Mr. Ahlul👍 Room types range from standard to suites or penthouses with prices and facilities adjusted accordingly. And it's located in the city center.. very close to everywhere for culinary delights. Overall 👍🫶
comments.originalComment: GM inn hotel syariah: Good kebersihan, kenyamanan tempat tidur, fungsi fasilitas (AC, Wi-Fi, shower), dan desain interior. Kamarnya suka bangett rapi, tenang, dan memiliki staf ramah. Mr: Nasrul dan Bg: Ahlul👍 Tipe kamar berkisar dari standar hingga suite atau penthouse dengan harga dan fasilitas yang disesuaikan. Dan di pusat kota.. kemana-mana dekat banget buat kuliner. Pokonya 👍🫶

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.responderName: Townhouse Oak near Tugu Simpang Lima formerly GM Inn Hotel
comments.reviewComments: The best hotel with a price around 100,000, clean rooms, wide and soft beds, comfortable blankets, cold air conditioning, spacious bathroom, strong water flow, only missing hot water, has an elevator, definitely recommended...
comments.originalComment: Hotel terbaik dengan harga 100rb-an, kamar bersih, kasur lebar dan empuk, selimut nyaman, ac dingin, kamar mandi luas, air kencang, hanya minus air panas, ad lift, pokok-a recommended...

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.responderName: Townhouse Oak near Tugu Simpang Lima formerly GM Inn Hotel
comments.reviewComments:
Highly recommended,  
Super service  
The room is clean,  
If you're in Banda, it's better to stay here,  
City center,  
Easy to go anywhere  
🤩🤩🤩🤩🤩🤩🤩  
Amazing 🔥🔥🔥🔥🔥🔥🔥
comments.originalComment:
Rekomendasi banget, 
Pelayanan superrrr
Kamar nya bersih, 
Kalau ke banda mending disini, 
Pusat kota, 
Kemana-mana gampang
🤩🤩🤩🤩🤩🤩🤩
Menyalaaaa 🔥🔥🔥🔥🔥🔥🔥

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.responderName: Townhouse Oak near Tugu Simpang Lima formerly GM Inn Hotel
comments.reviewComments: Suitable for families, as all rooms are together and there is a lift facility, so no need to get tired going up and down the stairs, Good Hotel.
comments.originalComment: Cocok untuk keluarga bisa satu kamar semua dan ada fasilitas lift nya jadi gk cape turun naik tangga, Good Hotel

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.responderName: Townhouse Oak near Tugu Simpang Lima formerly GM Inn Hotel
comments.reviewComments: Super comfortable, clean, and luxurious, will definitely come back here again, highly recommend this accommodation for those who want to holiday or for other events. 🥰❤️ Close to everything.
comments.originalComment:
Super nyaman bersih dan mewah, next bakalan ke sini lagi,rekomen deh penginapan untuk yang mau holiday atau acara lainnya🥰❤️
Dekat kemana2

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.responderName: Townhouse Oak near Tugu Simpang Lima formerly GM Inn Hotel
comments.reviewComments: Amazing hotel, cool, super friendly and polite service, cleanliness is okay and there is an elevator for access to the upper floors, free fitness thank you Mr. Nasrol and Mr. Ahlul...
comments.originalComment: Luar biasa Hotel, Keren, pelayanan super ramah dan sopan, kebersihan oke dan ada lift utk akses ke lantai atas, free fitnes thank you b.Nasrol dan b. Ahlul...

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.responderName: Townhouse Oak near Tugu Simpang Lima formerly GM Inn Hotel
comments.reviewComments: Very satisfied.. there is also a lift so I don't get tired of going up and down the stairs. Next, I want to stay here again, God willing.
comments.originalComment:
Puas bangett.. ada lift juga jadi ga capek naik turun tangga.
Next mau nginap disini lagi insyaallah

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.responderName: Townhouse Oak near Tugu Simpang Lima formerly GM Inn Hotel
comments.reviewComments: The location is in the city center, yes according to the price, I got a bathroom door that doesn't have a lock. Other than that, it's okay.
comments.originalComment:
Lokasi berada di pusat kota, ya sesuai harga, saya dapat pintu kamarmandi yg nggak ada kuncinya.
Untuk lainya ok.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.responderName: Townhouse Oak near Tugu Simpang Lima formerly GM Inn Hotel
comments.reviewComments: Waktu kesini pertama pesan dengan tipe kamar yang sama masih puas ,makanya pesen lagi eh sekarang bener bener mengerikan kamarnya, kamar mandi ada semacam cacing cacing kecil dilantai, kamar mandi ga bersih, pintu kamar mandi gaada kuncinya, tv gabisa, bantal tipis, ga recommended untuk kesini padahal ini saya kesini untuk kedua kalinya

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?

comments.reviewComments: Please synchronize the Agoda application with the actual situation, booking but the rooms are already full.
comments.originalComment: Mohon disinkronkan kembali antara aplikasi agodanya dengan fakta di lapangan,booking tapi kamar sudah habis
